title: Alyonka
actors: Natalya Ovodova, Irina Zarubina, Vasiliy Shukshin
plot: Set in 1955 when many migrated from Russia to the Steppes of Kazakhstan, this is the trip back to the Canal from the frontier and farms by a number of people who tell their settler stories. Alenka Muratova (Ovodova) is a winsome 1...
